12.atomic_facts:
1. Roderick Lee provided written testimony for the U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission Hearing on CCP Decision-Making and the 20th Party Congress on January 27, 2022, pages 11 and 13.
2. PLA Daily published an article titled "Political Military Division of Labor Does Not Divide the House" on Sina on July 22, 2014.
3. PLA Daily published an article titled "Being Able to Fight and Win Is the 'Hard Core' for Political Officers" on People's Daily Online on September 4, 2019.
4. James Mulvenon wrote an article titled "Hotel Gutian: We Haven't Had That Spirit Here since 1929" in China Leadership Monitor on March 19, 2015, page 5.
5. People's Daily published a note titled "Notes on Chairman Xi's Attendance at the All-Army Political Work Conference" on November 3, 2014.
6. PLA Daily published an article titled "Political Cadres Must Pass Military Command" on November 9, 2021.
7. Chen Dian Hong and Feng Qiang wrote an article titled "Stepping out of a TV Series, This Is an Ordinary Day in the Life of Literature and Martial Hero Li Yannian" on China Military Online on November 5, 2021.
8. Roderick Lee provided written testimony for the U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission Hearing on CCP Decision-Making and the 20th Party Congress on January 27, 2022, page 13.
9. Guoguang Wu wrote an article titled "Continuous Purges: Xi's Control of the Public Security Apparatus and the Changing Dynamics of CCP Elite Politics" in China Leadership Monitor on December 1, 2020, pages 1 and 8.
10. Christopher K. Johnson wrote an article titled "Reshaping China's 'Deep State': President Xi's Assault on China's Security Services: Grasping Tightly the Key Levers of Power" in the Mercator Institute for China Studies on June 2016, No. 1, pages 58–63.
11. Timothy Heath provided written testimony for the U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission Hearing on What Keeps Xi Up at Night: Beijing's Internal and External Challenges on February 7, 2019, page 9.
12. Minxin Pei wrote an article titled "The CCP's Domestic Security Taskmaster: The Central Political and Legal Affairs Commission" in China Leadership Monitor on September 1, 2021, page 2.
13. Sheena Chestnut Greitens wrote an article titled "Domestic Security in China under Xi Jinping" in China Leadership Monitor on March 1, 2019.
14. Xinhua published an article titled "CCP Central Committee Publishes 'Chinese Communist Party Regulations on Political-Legal Work'" on January 18, 2019.
15. Christopher K. Johnson wrote an article titled "Reshaping China's 'Deep State': President Xi's Assault on China's Security Services: Grasping Tightly the Key Levers of Power" in the Mercator Institute for China Studies on June 2016, No. 1, pages 58–63.
16. People's Daily published an article titled "Xi Jinping Delivers Important Instructions on Political Legal Work" on January 21, 2015.
17. Guoguang Wu wrote an article titled "Continuous Purges: Xi's Control of the Public Security Apparatus and the Changing Dynamics of CCP Elite Politics" in China Leadership Monitor on December 1, 2020, page 8.
18. Christopher K. Johnson wrote an article titled "Reshaping China's 'Deep State': President Xi's Assault on China's Security Services: Grasping Tightly the Key Levers of Power" in the Mercator Institute for China Studies on June 2016, No. 1, pages 58–60.

26. James Mulvenon provided oral testimony for the U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission Hearing on CCP Decision-Making and the 20th Party Congress on January 27, 2022, page 232.

30. Minxin Pei wrote an article titled "The CCP's Domestic Security Taskmaster: The Central Political and Legal Affairs Commission" in China Leadership Monitor on September 1, 2021, pages 4–5.
31. CCP Central Committee and PRC State Council published the Full Text of the Plan for Deepening the Reform of Party and State Agencies on March 21, 2018.
32. Minxin Pei wrote an article titled "The CCP's Domestic Security Taskmaster: The Central Political and Legal Affairs Commission" in China Leadership Monitor on September 1, 2021, pages 4–5.
